# ShepherdAI

> ShepherdAI is a church management platform that helps pastors save 8+ hours per week by automating admin tasks — sermon-to-social media, visitor follow-up, prayer management, devotionals, newsletters, and more. Starting at $19/mo.

## What ShepherdAI Does

ShepherdAI automates the repetitive administrative work that consumes pastors' time, so they can focus on ministry and people instead of paperwork.

### Core Features

- **Visitor Follow-up**: AI writes 6 unique personalized emails per visitor based on their background. Pastor previews, edits, then auto-sends. No two emails are the same.
- **Sermon to Social Media**: Turn sermon notes into multiple engaging social media posts (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter) in 2 minutes. AI shows its reasoning process.
- **Prayer Management**: AI-generated responses with Bible verses for prayer requests. Congregants submit prayers anytime, community can like and reply.
- **Daily Devotional**: Bible verses, meditation prompts, life application, and closing prayer — generated fresh every day with email delivery to congregation.
- **Weekly Newsletter**: Transform week highlights into professional, engaging newsletters.
- **Announcements**: Generate polished church announcements for services, events, and special occasions in seconds.
- **Batch Content**: One sermon to 50 social media posts. One theme to a month of devotionals. Scale your ministry content.
- **Template Marketplace**: Browse and use sermon outlines and templates from pastors worldwide.
- **AI Style Learning**: ShepherdAI learns your writing style, tone, and preferences over time. The more you use it, the better it gets.
- **AI Member Pastoral Plan**: When congregants join, AI analyzes their background and needs to generate a personalized pastoral care plan.
- **Church Accounting**: Manual entry with automatic financial reports. Weekly, monthly, and annual statements.
- **AI Church Reports**: Weekly, monthly, and annual ministry health reports with 6-dimension analysis and AI recommendations.
- **Activity Planner**: AI generates complete event plans for 8 activity types — fellowship, outreach, holiday, retreat, VBS, and more.
- **Congregant Engagement**: Points, badges, and daily devotionals keep congregation active. Reward participation automatically.
- **Church Discovery**: Newcomers find and join your church online. AI matches them by location and denomination.
- **Community Knowledge Base**: Share wisdom and learn from ministry leaders worldwide.

### Pricing

- **Free**: $0/mo — 3 tools, basic features, up to 25 congregants
- **Starter**: $19/mo — 7 tools, visitor follow-up, sermon-to-social, devotionals, newsletters
- **Pro**: $39/mo — 10 tools, batch content, AI style learning, accounting, advanced reports
- **Growth**: $79/mo — All 15+ tools, unlimited congregants, priority support, activity planner, church discovery

Annual plans available with discount. No credit card required for free plan.

### Security & Trust

- 256-bit AES encryption
- GDPR compliant
- Data never sold or shared
- No credit card required to start
- SOC 2 aligned practices

### Who Is ShepherdAI For

- Small to mid-size church pastors (under 200 members) who spend too much time on admin
- Church administrators who manage communications, visitor follow-up, and newsletters
- Associate pastors and ministry leaders who need content at scale
- Church planters who need professional tools on a tight budget

### Key Differentiators vs Competitors

- Lowest starting price ($0 vs $49-72/mo from major competitors)
- AI personalization (not just templates — learns your style)
- Visitor follow-up with 6 unique emails per visitor (competitors offer manual or 1 generic email)
- All-in-one platform (sermon tools + visitor follow-up + prayer + devotional + accounting + reports)
- Free tier with real functionality (not just a trial)

## AI Models Used

- DeepSeek AI for content generation, sermon analysis, and pastoral insights
- All AI-generated content is clearly labeled
- AI is a tool to assist pastors, never to replace pastoral judgment

- Support: support@shepherdaitech.com
